title: Live from the Centre of the Earth
original_title: JARV IS... Beyond the Pale - Live From The Centre of The Earth
overview: “Beyond the Pale” was written (& partially recorded) in front of a live audience, so it feels extra-strange not to be able to take it on the road at the moment. Fortunately, our friends Iain & Jane suggested a way round the problem: set up our equipment in a cave & they would film the results. We have invented a new way of playing a concert.
